All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

R

receiveLobbies(ArrayList<Integer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the receiveLobbies method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
receiveLobbies(ArrayList<Integer>) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the receiveLobbies method sets the list of available lobbies and change the state of the view to "choose_lobby".
RED - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Token
The red token is assigned to the player that chooses it during the lobby phase.
refreshClicked() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.JoinGameController
Method to refresh the list of lobbies
removeClient(RMIClientSkeleton) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.MultipleMatchesHandler
the removeClient method removes a ClientSkeleton from the mapRMI.
removeClient(ClientHandler) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.MultipleMatchesHandler
the removeClient method removes a ClientHandler from the map.
removeLobby(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.MultipleMatchesHandler
the removeLobby method removes a lobby from the lobbyList map.
removeToken(Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
removes a token from the list of tokens.
REQUEST_LOBBY - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
REQUEST_LOBBY message type
resDeckClicked(ActionEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Action of the topResDeck button, draws a card from the resource deck
resetAfterDisconnection() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to reset the client model after after a game.
Resource - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game
The Resource enumeration contains all the possible resources that can be obtained by a player during the game.
ResourceCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable
The ResourceCard class represents a generic resource card of the game.
ResourceCard(int, Front, Back) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable.ResourceCard
The ResourceCard(id, front, back, mainResource) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id, front side, back side and mainResource.
ResourceDeck - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks
The ResourceDeck class is a subclass of Deck that creates a list of ResourceCards.
ResourceDeck(CardCreator) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.ResourceDeck
The ResourceDeck(cc) constructor calls the constructor of the superclass to instantiate the ArrayList of cards, then it assigns the fileName attribute to the ResourceCards.json file in the /resources/cards/ folder and finally, it calls the initializeDeck(cc) method to create the list of ResourceCards.
ResourcesBoundObjective - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective
The ResourcesBoundObjective class represents the specific objective cards that require a certain amount of visible objects in the Kingdom to obtain the points indicated on the objective card.
ResourcesBoundObjective(int, int, Hashtable<Resource, Integer>) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.ResourcesBoundObjective
The ResourcesBoundObjective(id, points, resourceNeeded) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id and points and then assigns the resourceNeeded attribute to the one given as parameter.
resourceToString(boolean) - Static method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.Card
the resourceToString method associates each kind of resource with the relative emoji or letter depending on the status of the encoding.
resultsButton - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
button to show the results
ResultsMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.endgame
the ResultsMessage class implements the MessageToClient Interface and handles the messages in the endgame that gives information about the resulting points of each player.
ResultsMessage(MessageId, Map<String, Integer>, Map<String, Integer>) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.endgame.ResultsMessage
The constructor creates a new ResultsMessage.
returnToLobby - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
button to return to the lobby
RMIClientSkeleton - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client
the RMIClientSkeleton is the remote client seen by the server, that exposes the methods called by the server.
RMIServer - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server
This class is the server that manages the RMI connections with the clients.
RMIServer(MultipleMatchesHandler) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This constructor initializes the RMIServer.
RMIServerStub - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server
This interface is used by the server to communicate with the client.
RMIVirtualServer - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver
This class is the RMI implementation of the VirtualServer interface.
RMIVirtualServer(RMIServerStub, RMIClientSkeleton) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
The constructor of the class.
RMIVirtualView - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview
the RMIVirtualVIew implements the methods of the VirtualView Interface in case the player chooses an RMI connection.
RMIVirtualView(RMIClientSkeleton, RMIServer) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
RMIVirtualView is a setter method for the ClientSkeleton and of the Server.
